claims.summary: Entropy oscillation across 0.85 could create a tail-vibrancy discontinuity.
claims.disposition: verify tail_vibrancy_gate_stays_tiny_across_reported_boundary_pair covers 0.849 and 0.851 and the smoothstep has zero value and zero limiting slope at the gate

claims.summary: The 48D projection should preserve narrative-arc and emotional-tail evidence rather than treating added dimensions as inert width.
claims.disposition: verify projection evidence and codec tests keep narrative-arc lanes 40-43, emotional tail participation, and reserved lanes 44-47 distinct and bounded

claims.summary: A shallow non-zero sigmoid could remove the exact-zero region below the entropy gate.
claims.disposition: require separate Mike/operator Tier 5 approval with exact vector parity delta, replay, pressure and distinguishability analysis, canary, abort criteria, and post-change felt review because this changes live codec output
